title: Magic Hair Salon Website

requirements.text: Create a visually striking hero section at the top of the homepage displaying the salon name 'Magic Hair Salon', the open/closed status badge (currently Open, closes at 9:00 PM), a 4.9/5 star rating with 265 reviews, and a prominent WhatsApp booking call-to-action button linking to wa.me/+918129529732.

quotes: make a website and make website name as Magic Hair salon

acceptanceCriteria: Salon name 'Magic Hair Salon' is prominently displayed as the page heading
Open status badge is visible with closing time '9:00 PM'
WhatsApp booking button links to wa.me/+918129529732
Hero section is visually prominent and mobile-responsive

requirements.text: Build a comprehensive Services section that organizes all offered services into clearly labeled category cards: Hair Services (Haircut, Hairstyling, Blow dry, Hair extensions, Balayage, Perms, Dreadlocks, Braids/Box braids, Shampoo & conditioning), Skin & Beauty (Facials, Skin care, Acne treatments, Make-up & bridal make-up, Microblading, Permanent makeup, Lash lift/Lash perms, Eyelash extensions, Eyebrow threading & shaping), Body Services (Waxing/Body waxing, Laser hair removal, Permanent hair removal, Pedicure, Manicure, Massage, Spa services, Tanning), Bridal & Event Services (Bridal services, Wedding & event preparation), and Other (Online booking, Mobile salon service, Shaving).
acceptanceCriteria: All 5 service categories are displayed as distinct cards or sections
Every individual service listed in the request appears under its correct category
Layout is responsive and readable on both mobile and desktop
Category headings are visually distinct from service item lists

requirements.text: Add a Location & Contact section displaying the full address (Nate Adattu Avenue, 1st Floor, Old Market Road, Junction, near Kurishupally, Pala, Kerala 686575), a clickable phone/WhatsApp link for 081295 29732 (formatted as +91 81295 29732), and a WhatsApp chat button. Include a 'Get Directions' link that opens Google Maps with the salon address pre-filled.

quotes: Old Market Road, Junction, near Kurishupally

acceptanceCriteria: Phone number is a clickable tel: link
Get Directions link opens Google Maps with the salon address
Section is clearly laid out and mobile-friendly

requirements.text: Apply a luxurious, elegant visual theme across the entire website: use a warm champagne and deep charcoal color palette with gold accent tones, refined serif or elegant sans-serif typography, soft gradient backgrounds, and smooth card-based layouts. The design should feel premium and beauty-focused, consistent with a high-end unisex salon brand. Ensure full mobile responsiveness throughout all sections.
acceptanceCriteria: Consistent warm champagne/gold/charcoal color palette applied site-wide
Visual hierarchy clearly guides users from hero to services to contact
Overall design feels premium and beauty-industry appropriate

constraints: Use only static frontend — no backend logic needed for this informational website
WhatsApp contact number must be exactly +91 81295 29732 (081295 29732)
Do not invent pricing or booking system — only link to WhatsApp for bookings
nonGoals: Online appointment scheduling system with calendar/database

required: Elegant salon hero banner with warm golden bokeh lights, soft champagne background, and subtle hair styling silhouettes (salon-hero.dim_1440x600.png)
Decorative section divider with gold scissors and comb motif on transparent background (salon-divider.dim_1200x80.png)
Circular salon logo mark featuring stylized hair wave and star with gold tones on dark background (salon-logo.dim_256x256.png)
